ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier for the order */,
  "shipment_delay" INTEGER /* Number of days delayed for shipment */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, processing, completed) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" TEXT /* ID of the shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* ID of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the shipment belongs to */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the shipment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" TEXT /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address_id" TEXT /* ID of the warehouse address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)
